titleStmt.title: SII 22.81: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 81. (A.R. No. 81 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJ. RĀJĀDHIRĀJA I—32nd YEAR (A.D. 1049-50)

summary.p: This has a long introduction beginning with the expression Tiṅgaḷērtaru etc. The record is mutilated and incomplete towards the end. It registers an agreement by the Śaṅkarappāḍi Nagarattār of Vāḷaiyūr in Vāṇagōppāḍi Pūrvadēśam to burn a perpetual lamp in the temple for the 20 kāśu received by them from one Veṇkāḍaṉ Narēndrachūḷāmaṇi of Nallāvūr in Pāmbūrnāḍu a division of Uyyakkoṇḍārvaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷertaru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaikkiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkolocci karuṅkali kaṭintu taṉ ciṟiya tātaiyai
yun tiruttamaiyaṉaiyuṅ kuṟikoḷ taṉṉiḷaṅkokkaḷaiyum neṟiyuṇar taṉṟirupputarvartammaiyun tuṉṟeḻil vāṉavan vallavaṉ
kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalaneṉap poṉṉaṇi cuṭar maṇimakuṭañ cūṭṭip paṭar pukaḻāṅkavaṟkavarnāṭaruḷi pāṅkamar tātaimuṉ[van=ta]
potalar teriyal vikkiramanāraṇaṉ ṟaṉṉaicca ttaruḷi nalakkalan=tavatarit torupatā nāḷāl tirumaṇimauli vāḻiyar
pūven=tiya coḻaṉnena puṉaintu maṉṉupallūḻiyuḷ teṉṉavar muvaruḷ mānāparaṇa maṇimuṭi Ānāpparumaṇip pacun=talai porukaḷattarintu vāḷviyakaḻal virakeraḷaṉaimu
ṉaivaiyiṟ piṭittut taṉatattivāraṇakkatakkiṭakkaḷiṟṟā lutaippit taruḷi An=ta mpukaḻ cun=tarapāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟaiveṇkuṭaiyuṅ kaṟṟaiveṇ cavari yum ciṅkācaṉa
mum veṅkaḷattiḻantu taṉmuṭiviḻat talaivirittaṭitaḷarntoṭa tollai mullaiyūrt turatti Olkalil veṇāṭṭaraicaic ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupukaḻ
rāmakuṭa muvar keṭa munintu viṭarkeḻu villavaṉ kuṭarmaṭikkoṇṭu taṉṉāṭuviṭṭoṭik kāṭupukkoḷippa vañciyam putumalar malain=tāṅkeñcalil velai
keḻu kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟuppittāhomallaṉu mañcak kevutaṉ ṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuḷ kaṇṭappayanuṅ kaṅkātiranum vaṇṭamar kaḷiṟṟoṭu
maṭiya tiṇṭiṟal varitara vikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum tirumuraṇ cāṅka maiyyaṉu mutaliṉar samarabhiru vuttuṭaiya viricuṭarppoṉ noṭayaṅkari puravi yoṭum pi
ṭittut taṉṉāṭaiyil ja koṇṭu tuṉṉār koḷḷippākkaiy Uḷḷeri maṭuttaruḷit taṉitaṉittaṇṭāṟ porutirai Uṭutta Ilaṅkaiyar komāṉ vikkiramabāhuvi
ṉ makuṭamum muṉṟaṉakkuṭaintu teṉṟamiḻ vaṭakalai terittu tecattavar veṟumaiy niṅka cuṭarkaṉakattavatarittu tulāpāram tuṭara Eṟikaṭaṟpaṭaiyaiy celvitte
ḻkaṭaliḻam pukkilaṅkecanākiya vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṉ parumaṇimuṭiyuṅ kāṇṭaku taṉṉatākiya taṉ kaṉṉakucciyaṉum Ārkali liḻañ ciriteṉṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷ nāṭun=ta
ṉṉuṟavoṭum pukuntu viḷaṅku muṭikavitta viracalāmekaṉ porkaḷattañ cittaṉ kālkaḷiṟiḻintu kavvaiyuṟṟoṭik kātaliyoṭu n=taṉṟavvaiyaippiṭittut tāyai mukkari
ya Āṅkavamāṉam niṅkutaṟkāka miṭṭum vantu vāṭṭoḻiliḻantu veṅkaḷattulan=ta ciṅkaḷattaracaṉ poṉṉaṇi muṭiyuṅ kaṉṉaraṉvaḻi vanturai keraḷattaracanākiya śrī
n mataṉarājaṉ Elloḷirt taṭamuṭimaṇiyuṅ koṇṭu vaṭapurattiru kālāvatum porupaṭai naṭātti kaṇṭaṉ tiṉakaraṉ nāraṇaṉ kaṇavati vaṇṭalar teriyal maticūtaṉa
ṉaṉṟeṉaippala Araicaraiy muṉaivayyiṟṟuratti vampalar tarupoḻil kampilinakaruḷ caḷukkiyar māḷikaiy takarppittiḷakkamil tantaimuṉ vanta kutakkaḷiṟṟuc cakkaravatti
vikkiramanāraṇaṉṟaṉ perumpaṭaiyarai Evi muṉpamar Āhavamallaṉum Añci Eṉṉum siṟasamel koṇṭu taṇpuṉal periyāṟṟaṅkarai pūṇṭūrk kaṭakamāna
karavaiyil muṉṟāmuṟaimaiyil Eṉṟetirviṭṭa maṉaṅkiḷar ṉeṭuvel teluṅka viccaiyaṉ ṟampiyar Iruvarumaṟumpiyar cilakkai Atta rājaṉum Akkappayaṉum
vikkiyar kaḷiṟṟup piṭakkac coḻaṉum coḻaviccayaṉum koṇṭayarājaṉum kuḷicilai muñcayaṉum mikkuyarkaḷiṟṟup piṭakkac coḻaṉum miṉappayaṉum viramāṇik kaṉum Eṉ
paṭaiñaroṭetirt tamar tutarkurājaṉum Avaṉṟuṇaiy virarum vākai viccayaṉ makaṉum mātāvum Eṉumavar mutaliyar puṉaikaḻal Araicarroṭu Eṉamaru makaḷiraiy tuṇ
ṭittu Eḻaraiyilakkamum Uyarpāḻpaṭuttaruḷi pūṇṭūrpatiyai poṭi paṭuttamaiyil Īṇṭokaimukaiyarercela naṭātti vārkavaṭivitaittu maṇṇeṉa tanāppi pārntirumāḷi
ṭareriparappi Āṅkamāṉakar veṅkaimiteḻuti Uyar jayastampa nāṭṭuvittuyya liyacai villavar miṉavar veḻkulac caḷukkiyar vallavar kaucalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cinturarayyaṇar
ciṅkaḷar paṅkaḷar An=tiramutaliyar Araicar Iṭu tiṟaikaḷum Āṟil loṉ ṟavaṉil kūṟukoḷ porukaḷum Uyarnta nāṉmaṟaiyavar mukantukoḷak kuṭuttu viśvalokattu viḷaṅku maṉuneṟiniṉṟa śva
metañ ceytaracu viṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻaṉ ṉuyarnta perumpukaḻ kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 2Āvatu vāṇakoppāṭiyāṉa pūrvatecattu vāḷai
caṅkarappāṭi nakarattom kaittiṭṭu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷa nāṭṭu pāmpūrnāṭṭu nallāvūr nallāvūrātai Ūrāṉ veṇkāṭaṉāṉa narendra cūḷāmaṇi muventaveḷārkku nāṅkaḷ Eḻuttiṭṭu Iṭṭukuṭutta paricāvatu I
ṟoṉṟimātevar śrīkoyilil Āṭavalārkku Ivar vaitta ti[ runun=tā] viḷakku Oṉṟu Ittirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟukkum Ivāṭṭai Āṭi mātam mutal Ivar Eṅkaḷvacam tan=ta Aṉṟāṭu nalkācu 2 10 Ikkācu I
ḷapāy nicatam Araicceviṭeṇṇaiyāka Ikkācirupatukkum nicatam muḻakkeṇṇai te paramaṉ sakāyaneṉṉu marakkāloṭokkum Uḻakkāl Eṇṇai Aṭṭi can=tirātitaStops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
